🎨

Instrument Coloring Pack

6 instruments · all use the pentatonic scale · color & learn!

🎹

Piano

The black keys alone form a pentatonic scale — try playing only the black keys!

🎸

Guitar

Every great guitar solo you've ever loved is probably pentatonic.

🥁

Steel Drum

Caribbean steel drums are tuned to pentatonic — instant island vibes!

🎵

Harmonica

Blues harmonica runs are almost entirely pentatonic scales.

🎺

Trumpet

Jazz trumpet solos love to dance through pentatonic notes.

🎻

Violin

Folk fiddle music worldwide stays almost entirely pentatonic.
